cot_prefix: Okay, I need to figure out what the main topic of the passage is. Let me start by reading through the text again carefully. The first paragraph talks about how both men and women are surrounded by media that focuses on dieting, exercise, fashion, and hairstyles. It mentions that men no longer just need a nice suit to be considered smart and handsome. The second paragraph brings up a survey by UWE where 80% of men are unhappy with their bodies, specifically mentioning issues like beer bellies and lack of muscles. The next part discusses the possible reasons for this, like the influence of role models on TV and in magazines leading to a perception of the "perfect body."
